failure_signature.details: Incorrect API key provided: sk-proj-...XXXX. You can find your API key at https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys.

problem.goal_state: Initialize LangChain agent with OpenAI model

solutions.solution_summary: Validate and correctly set the OpenAI API key in environment variables
solution_steps: Verify the API key is set: echo $OPENAI_API_KEY (should start with 'sk-' and not be truncated)
Check that the key has not been rotated or revoked in the OpenAI dashboard at platform.openai.com/api-keys
If using .env files, ensure python-dotenv is loading them before the LLM client initializes: from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv()
Verify no whitespace or newline characters in the key: OPENAI_API_KEY=$(echo $OPENAI_API_KEY | tr -d '\n ')
If using project-scoped keys (sk-proj-...), ensure the key has access to the required models in the project settings

failure_signature.details: You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, read the docs: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/error-codes/api-errors.

problem.goal_state: Run CrewAI agent crew for data analysis task

solutions.solution_summary: Add billing information or upgrade plan to restore API access
solution_steps: Navigate to platform.openai.com/account/billing and verify a valid payment method is on file
Check the Usage page to see if you have hit a hard spend cap under Billing > Limits
If on a free trial, add a payment method to upgrade to a paid plan
Set a reasonable monthly budget limit to prevent unexpected charges while allowing continued access
If the issue persists after adding billing, wait 5-10 minutes for the billing system to propagate the change

failure_signature.details: Your API key has expired. Please generate a new key at console.anthropic.com.

problem.goal_state: Start AutoGen multi-agent conversation with Anthropic backend

solutions.solution_summary: Rotate the expired API key and update all configuration references
solution_steps: Generate a new API key at console.anthropic.com under API Keys
Update the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable in your shell profile, .env file, and any CI/CD secrets
If using AutoGen's OAI_CONFIG_LIST, update the api_key field in the config file
Implement a key rotation schedule: set calendar reminders to rotate keys before expiry
Consider using a secrets manager (AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault) to centralize key management and automate rotation

failure_signature.details: The model 'gpt-4o' does not exist or you do not have access to it. You may need to join the waitlist or your organization needs to be granted access.

problem.goal_state: Deploy production agent using OpenAI Agents SDK

solutions.solution_summary: Verify model access permissions at the organization and project level
solution_steps: Check your organization's model access at platform.openai.com/account/limits to confirm gpt-4o is available
If using project-scoped API keys, verify the project has the model enabled in project settings
Try using the model ID 'gpt-4o-2024-08-06' explicitly instead of the alias 'gpt-4o'
Contact OpenAI support or your organization admin to request model access if it is restricted
As a temporary workaround, fall back to 'gpt-4o-mini' which has broader access availability
